Specifies files and directories for Git to ignore in the Flask codebase.

# Purpose
The content specifies a `.gitignore` file used in a software project to exclude certain files and directories from being tracked by Git. It includes common directories and files such as `.idea/`, `.vscode/`, `__pycache__/`, `.tox/`, `.coverage`, `htmlcov/`, `docs/_build/`, `dist/`, and `venv/`, which are typically generated during development, testing, or building processes and do not need to be included in version control.
